My permanently underwhelmed teenage nephews said it was the best pizza they  ever had!Price per person£10–20Food: 5Service: 5Atmosphere: 5Recommended dishesPizza Margherita, Vodka Pie, Sardenara, Pepperoni Pizza, Cheese BallsNoise levelModerate noiseSeating typeIndoor dining area, Bar area, Outdoor patio / terrace, Booth seating
duplicates.owner_response: Response from the owner 20 hours agoWe are so pleased with your comments and enjoyed our food! Thank you so much for taking time to review us! Hope to see you again!🙏 …

duplicates.text:
Took our teenage nephews here to play the games consoles and have a pizza as a means to occupy the afternoon.
So glad we did as wow this was the best pizza! Genuinely fabulous. We had the phoenix pie and all of us were very happy with it. One of the best pizzas I've ever had. Both nephews said repeatedly was the best pizza they've ever had.
We also had potato tots, Mac and cheese bites as well as chicken strips. OMG the strips were delicious.
Everything really good.
Highly recommend.Food: 5Service: 5Atmosphere: 5
duplicates.owner_response: Response from the owner 20 hours agoThank you so much Gavin! You are very welcome, hope to see you all again soon! 🙏 …
Response from the owner 20 hours ago😎🙏🙏🙏 …

duplicates.text: Best Pizzas full stop! Tom knows what he’s doing, he’s passionate about what he does and this shows throughout! Lovely guy, lovely food, splendido 😊👍🏼Price per person£10–20Food: 5Service: 5Atmosphere: 5Noise levelLoud, but you can still talkSeating typeIndoor dining area, Bar area, Outdoor patio / terrace

duplicates.text: The best pizza I’ve ever tried! Definitely worth the trip after my mate, who’s been three times now, recommended me Impasto. Absolutely delicious and I can’t wait to go back in a few weeks. And Tom, the head chef/owner, is such a sound guy who’s really passionate about what he does. Can’t recommend this place enough! 10/10Food: 5Service: 5Atmosphere: 5
duplicates.owner_response: Response from the owner a week agoThank you so much for your review! You are very welcome! Hope to see you again soon! 🙏🙏 …

duplicates.text: Seemed expensive per pizza but they are not usual UK sizes. We ordered 2 and had to take a whole one home because of how gigantic they were. Perfectly baked NY style dough base and good toppings.
duplicates.owner_response: Response from the owner 3 weeks agoHi Jim, thanks for the review! I’m glad that you enjoyed your pizza! They are gigantic and based on two or more sharing each one, as they are more of a challenge to defeat solo! 🤣 hope to see you again! 🙏 …

duplicates.text: Words honestly can’t do this New York–style pizza justice. The dough is cooked to absolute perfection, and you can taste how carefully chosen the ingredients are in every bite. The sides deserve their own shoutout too — the chicken tenders were tender, crispy, and absolutely drenched in the chef’s house sauce (in the best way possible). 10/10 experience, would recommend without hesitationMeal typeDinnerPrice per person£20–30Food: 5Service: 5Atmosphere: 5
duplicates.owner_response: Response from the owner a month agoAmazing praise! Thank you so much for taking time to write a review! You are very welcome and we hope to see you again! 🙏🙏 …
